name: Howard Marks — Cycle Position
description: Filter stocks at low end of their own 5Y valuation cycle (mean-reversion gate). Pairs well with quality presets.

rules.name: pe-below-mean-5y
rules.expr: pe_ttm is not None and pe_ttm <= pe_mean_5y * 0.90 if has('pe_mean_5y') else False

rules.name: pbv-below-mean-5y
rules.expr: pbv is not None and pbv <= pbv_mean_5y * 0.90 if has('pbv_mean_5y') else False

rules.name: ps-below-mean-5y
rules.expr: ps_ttm is not None and ps_ttm <= ps_mean_5y * 0.90 if has('ps_mean_5y') else False

rules.name: div-yield-elevated
rules.expr: div_yield is not None and avg_div_yield_5y is not None and div_yield >= avg_div_yield_5y
